steps.title: Your first expedition
steps.body: Your goal is to defeat the guardian by brewing complete potions. This guided battle saves automatically and every required action remains fully playable.

steps.title: Defeat the guardian
steps.body: Reduce Enemy Vitality to zero. Armor absorbs direct damage, while Poison bypasses Armor and deals damage over enemy turns.

steps.title: Read the next move
steps.body: NEXT shows exactly what the enemy will do and how many successful pours remain. Every legal pour advances this countdown by one.

steps.title: Pick up a flask
steps.body: Tap the highlighted flask. A pour always moves the connected run of one color from the very top.

steps.title: Pour onto a legal target
steps.body: Tap the second flask. Its top must match the moving color, or it must be completely empty. Enough free space is also required.

steps.title: Mistakes are reversible
steps.body: Undo restores the exact previous flask state and restores the enemy countdown. Your remaining Undo count is shown below its icon.

steps.title: Complete a potion
steps.body: Build four layers of one color. Red deals damage, Green restores HP, Blue grants Shield, and Purple applies Armor-piercing Poison.

steps.title: Potions generate Mana
steps.body: A completed normal potion grants 25 Mana; Wild grants 18. Mana pays for your active Skill. It is separate from Ultimate charge. Tap GOT IT to fill Mana for this lesson.

steps.title: The three colored dots
steps.body: These are your last three completed potion essences. They are a history display, not extra moves. Order matters because formulas match the latest two or three colors.

steps.title: Create Fire Burst
steps.body: Complete a second Red Fire Potion. Red then Red matches Fire Burst, amplifies the second potion, and grants Ultimate charge. The board remains fully touchable.

steps.title: Reactions charge Ultimate
steps.body: Alchemy Reactions add Ultimate charge independently from Mana. At 100%, ULT lights up and unleashes the selected hero kit's strongest effect.

steps.title: Cast your active Skill
steps.body: The lit Skill button spends Mana. Its exact effect, cost, and potion-based cooldown come from your selected hero kit; hold or focus it to read the details.

steps.title: When to use New Mix
steps.body: New Mix replaces the entire board and always spends one move. The first normal New Mix costs no Mana; repeat mixes cost 20 Mana. A genuinely stuck board always gets emergency recovery.

steps.title: Choose your route
steps.body: Only glowing connected nodes are reachable. Future encounters stay hidden. Compare node types, current HP, and your build before choosing the next risk.
